creator: martin@sumuk.de
text:
Most duplicate lines originated from the development version
being the same as the normal version of a port.  The ports
tripwire-1.2 and linux_base-6.1 each have two directories.

The attached patch adds a flag to make_index which marks
ports already printed and avoids printing these port lines.

The diff was done against
$FreeBSD: ports/Tools/make_index,v 1.8 2001/03/08 02:28:44 steve Exp $

Martin

-- 
Marxpitn
